quoteLast: It had been our intention to stay overnight at Bandoeng, strongly recommended by Mr. Gantvoort, the courteous manager of the Hotel des Indes in Batavia, but we pressed on with the intention of devoting more time to the eastern end of the island.
title: Across the Equator: A Holiday Trip in Java
author: Reid, Thomas H.
